name: f1-wiki-automator
description: Cloudflare Worker application to automate F1 fandom wiki page management

scripts.test: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/verify-sync-kv.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-wikitext-parse.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-infobox-update.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-career-placeholder.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-legacy-kv.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-jolpica-cache.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-practice-sessions.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-llm-reporter.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-kv-ops.ts
